description: Threat actor profile card with name, nation state, tags, two stats, bio, and threat level panel

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Small top label, e.g. 'THREAT ACTOR PROFILE'
fields.LABEL_2: Group or affiliation, e.g. 'UNC3944 / OCTO TEMPEST'
fields.LABEL_3: Origin or context, e.g. 'English-speaking, US/UK based, est. 2022'
fields.TAG_3: Third tag shown on right panel, e.g. 'NATION STATE'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: 2-3 sentence description of the threat actor
fields.ALERT_TEXT: Badge text in header, e.g. 'HIGH RISK'
